title: quercus rotundifolia f. dolichocalyx
intro: Quercus rotundifolia f. dolichocalyx is a subspecies of the Spanish oak tree, specifically a variant of the Quercus rotundifolia species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can contribute to various health benefits. The health benefits of Quercus rotundifolia f. dolichocalyx include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions that are rich in flavonoids and polyphenols, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat chronic diseases.
